description: Multi-role safeguarding and incident reporting platform for Morna school, compliant with LOPIVI, Convivèxit, and Machista Violence protocols. Child-led development with child-friendly language throughout.

capabilities: Request a chat with a trusted adult
Send urgent help alert with location
Browse educational content about bullying and safety
View child incident history (parent-visible reports only)
See incident status and school summaries
View trend analytics (reports over time, types, status charts)
Report a concern on behalf of child
Assess incidents (staff notes, witness statements, parent summary)
View and reply to pupil messages
Access staff education resources and protocol guides
View all classes in assigned year group
Broader incident visibility across year group
Open and manage formal protocols (Convivèxit, LOPIVI, Machista Violence)
Coordinator dashboard with KPIs and analytics
Analytics: incidents by type, year group, location, escalation tier, monthly trends
View top victims and repeated behaviour students
Manage delegated roles and governance appointments
Manage annex templates and referral bodies
Designated safe adult for vulnerable pupils
View and reply to pupil messages

authentication.description: Multi-role JWT authentication with role-based access control
details: Three login tabs: Pupil, Staff, Parent
Pupil login: school selector, scrollable name dropdown with animal avatars, 4-digit PIN
Quick Demo Login panel with one-click access to all seeded accounts
Automatic token injection on API requests

incidentReporting.description: Role-aware incident reporting with child-friendly and professional modes

pupilMode.title: Tell us what happened
features: Child-friendly category buttons (Physical, Verbal, Mind games, My body my rules, Leaving out, Pressure/control, Property, Online)
Category hint tooltips in child-appropriate language
Emotion picker with emojis (Scared, Sad, Angry, Worried, Lonely, Embarrassed, Confused, Okay)
Browsable dropdown name pickers for victims, perpetrators, and witnesses
Child-friendly labels: 'Who was hurt or affected?', 'Who did it?', 'Did anyone else see it?'
'I don't know their name' toggle with structured description builder
School location dropdown with custom location option
Anonymous reporting option
Submit button: 'Submit Report securely'

staffMode.title: Log a Safeguarding Incident
features: Professional category labels (Physical, Verbal, Psychological, Sexual, Relational, Coercive, Property, Online)
Professional category hint tooltips
Child emotional state tracker: 'How was the child feeling? (if known)'
Search-based pupil picker for victims, perpetrators, witnesses
'Describe unknown person(s)' toggle
'How did you become aware of this?' section (told by child, witnessed it)
Staff Safeguarding Checks: children separated?, coordinator notified?
Submit button: 'Log Incident securely'
No anonymous option (staff reports are always attributed)

unknownPersonBuilder: Age relation (role-aware: 'Older than me' for pupils, 'Older than the victim' for staff)
Stored as JSONB with roleInIncident tag (victim/perpetrator)

incidentManagement.description: Full incident lifecycle management with filtering and assessment
features: Incidents list with multi-filter: category, status, year group, class, pupil name search
Incident cards showing reference number, category, status badge, victim/perpetrator names, date, location
Incident detail page with full information display
Status management: Open, Under Review, Closed
Escalation tier display with color-coded severity and response guidance
Link to open formal protocol from incident
Unknown person descriptions displayed with role badges
Add to pupil file toggle
Staff notes (internal, not visible to parents)
Witness statements field
Parent summary (curated, safe version for parents)
Share with parents toggle
Role-based visibility: parents see only parent summary, staff see full details
Authorization: teachers can only assess incidents involving their class pupils

protocols.description: Formal safeguarding protocol management aligned with Balearic Islands legislation

types.name: Convivèxit
types.annexes: 7 annexes (ANNEX-I through ANNEX-VII): initial communication, information gathering, conclusions, intervention plan, follow-up, family communication, closure report

types.name: LOPIVI
types.purpose: Broad safeguarding (neglect, abuse, duty to report)
types.annexes: 4 annexes (LOP-I through LOP-IV): risk communication, protection delegate, action registry, safe environment assessment

types.name: Machista Violence (CAIB)
types.annexes: 4 annexes (MV-I through MV-IV): initial detection, risk assessment, external referral, follow-up

features: Protocol creation with linked incident auto-fill
Risk assessment: risk level (low/medium/high/critical), risk factors checklist (8 options), protective factors checklist (4 options)
Protective measures tracking
Gender-based violence flag
External referral management with referral body linking
Parent notification tracking
Protocol status management (open/closed)
Interview records linked to protocols
Case tasks with assignment, priority, due dates, completion tracking

patternAlerts.description: Automated pattern detection and alert system
features: Pattern detection triggered after incident creation
Alert levels: Red (critical) and Amber (warning)
Alert types: repeated perpetrator, welfare concern, multi-victim
Linked to specific incidents and pupils
Review and status management (open/reviewed)
Notes field for coordinator observations

messaging.description: Safe communication system between pupils and trusted adults
pupilFeatures: Dynamic safe contacts list (form tutor prioritised, then other staff)
Send messages with priority flags (green=just letting you know, amber=need help soon, red=need help now)
Quick phrase buttons for common messages
Request a chat (specific message type for in-person meeting)
Urgent help button with school location picker
Urgent help validates delivery and shows fallback on failure
Message history feed (My Messages) with read/unread indicators
Zero-target guard with in-person fallback instruction
staffFeatures: Conversation list grouped by contact with unread counts
Auto-mark messages as read when viewed

features: Personalised greeting with name
Report a concern action card
Safe contacts list with message/chat/urgent help actions
My Messages feed
Urgent help button
Summary stats: total reports, active, resolved, unread updates
Child incident history (parent-visible reports only)
Expandable incident cards with school summary, emotional state, reviewer
Trend analytics: reports over time (line chart), types (bar chart), status (pie chart)
Action items and recent updates feed
Class/year overview with pupil count
Quick action cards: Report Incident, My Class/Year Group, View Incidents
Recent incidents feed (5 most recent in scope) with escalation tiers
Overview tab: KPIs (total incidents, open protocols, alerts, monthly reports), recent incidents, active pattern alerts
Analytics tab: incidents by type/year group/location, monthly trends, escalation tiers, top victims, repeated behaviour students
Role-targeted notifications (incident escalations, protocol updates, task assignments, parent updates)
Acknowledgment tracking (acknowledgedAt timestamp)
Unread count badge in navigation
Empty state: 'All caught up' view

topics: What to do if you're being bullied
Signs your child might be experiencing bullying
How to talk to your child

features: Teacher: sees assigned class only
Head of Year: sees all classes in year group
Coordinator/Head Teacher/SENCO: sees all pupils in school
Support Staff: customisable scope (class, year, or school)
'View incidents' link per pupil
Edit first name and last name
Edit email (staff and parents only)
Animal avatar picker for pupils (16 options: Fox, Bear, Dolphin, Panda, etc.)
Read-only account details (role, year group, class, email)

compliance.description: Governance and compliance management aligned with Balearic Islands legislation
referralBodies: IB Dona (Institut Balear de la Dona)
features: Delegated role appointment and revocation with training dates
Annex template management per framework
External referral body directory with contact details
Audit logging of all safeguarding actions

auditLogging.description: Comprehensive audit trail for safeguarding compliance

pages.name: Login
pages.description: Multi-tab login (pupil/staff/parent) with quick demo login panel

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.description: Role-specific dashboard (pupil: speak up + safe contacts, teacher: class overview + actions, parent: child reports + analytics, coordinator: KPIs + analytics)

pages.name: Report/Log Incident
pages.description: Role-aware incident form (pupil: child-friendly with dropdowns, staff: professional with search and safeguarding checks)

pages.name: My Class / My Pupils / All Pupils
pages.description: Role-scoped pupil list with per-pupil incident links

pages.name: Incidents
pages.access: Teacher, Head of Year, Coordinator, Head Teacher, SENCO
pages.description: Filterable incident list with cards showing reference, category, status, people involved

pages.name: Incident Detail
pages.description: Full incident view with status management, protocol linking, teacher assessment panel

pages.name: Protocols
pages.description: Active protocol list with reference numbers, types, status badges

pages.name: New Protocol
pages.description: Create protocol form with risk assessment, linked incident auto-fill

pages.name: Protocol Detail
pages.description: Protocol detail with linked incidents, interviews, notifications, risk assessment

pages.name: Pattern Alerts
pages.access: Teacher, Head of Year, Coordinator, Head Teacher, SENCO
pages.description: Pattern detection alerts with severity levels, linked incidents, review status

pages.name: Messages
pages.description: Conversation inbox with threaded replies and auto-read marking

pages.name: Learn
pages.description: Role-specific education: pupil (bullying awareness), staff (protocol guides), parent (support guidance)

pages.name: Settings
pages.description: Profile editing with animal avatar picker for pupils

scripts.seed-compliance: Creates 15 annex templates, 10 referral bodies, 4 delegated role appointments
scripts.seed-demo: Creates 11 demo incidents across all categories and escalation tiers
scripts.seed-history: Creates 44+ historical incidents spanning 6 months with context-aware locations
scripts.seed-full: Creates 2 protocols, 3 pattern alerts, 17 notifications, 7 case tasks, 4 interviews, 13 messages, 5 audit log entries

credentials.staff: coordinator@safeschool.dev, head@safeschool.dev, teacher@safeschool.dev, teacher2-4@safeschool.dev, support@safeschool.dev, senco@safeschool.dev — all password123
